news.title: 20,000 job cuts at Meta, Microsoft raise concern that AI-driven labor crisis is here
news.description: Meta said it's cutting 10% of its workforce, just as Microsoft announced that it's offering employee buyouts for the first time in its 51-year history.

news.title: Analysis: The threat to the Fed's independence isn't over
news.description: President Donald Trump has waged a long campaign to rein in the Fed. Prosecutors' decision to drop an investigation into Jerome Powell isn't the end.

news.title: Google to invest up to $40 billion in Anthropic as search giant spreads its AI bets
news.description: Anthropic said its latest agreement with Google expands on a longstanding partnership between the two companies.

news.title: Intel's stock has best day since 1987, soaring 24% as chipmaker shows signs of a turnaround
news.description: Shares of Intel have more than doubled this year on optimism that backing from the government will help the company's position in AI.

news.title: S&P 500, Nasdaq close at records, boosted by Intel, as investors hope for a restart to U.S.-Iran talks
news.description: On Thursday, the Nasdaq Composite suffered its worst daily performance in nearly a month.

news.title: This 'sleep like a baby' portfolio strategy is having its best year in nearly a century, BofA's Hartnett says
news.description: Forget the 60/40 portfolio: Investors have had a much better option this year to get better diversification and stronger returns.

news.title: Pirro could reopen Fed probe at any time, Democratic senators warn
news.description: Sens. Elizabeth Warren and Dick Durbin, in a letter obtained first by CNBC, question Jeanine Pirro's mention of reopening a probe of Fed Chair Jerome Powell.

news.title: Will he stay or will he go? With criminal probe over, Fed Chair Powell faces big decision
news.description: The decision could have important ramifications for policymaking at an especially delicate time.

news.title: Stock markets are too high and set to fall, says Bank of England deputy
news.description: It is unusual for a senior figure at the Bank to be so forthright on market movements.

news.title: US justice department drops probe into Fed chairman Jerome Powell
news.description: President Donald Trump had accused Powell of improper cost overruns in renovating the Fed's building.

news.title: How does it affect me if share prices fall?
news.description: Changes in the FTSE 100 and other indexes are not just for financial experts, they can affect our lives.

news.title: White House memo claims mass AI theft by Chinese firms
news.description: A memo from Michael Kratsios says firms, mainly in China, are wrongfully distilling US AI models.

news.title: Which airlines are cancelling flights to the UK - and what can you do?
news.description: Airlines are putting up prices and cancelling flights in response to higher jet fuel prices.

news.title: From scientist to silk farmer: India's silk industry renewal
news.description: Silk production is an increasingly high-tech business in India.

news.title: US soldier charged after winning $400,000 betting on removal of Maduro
news.description: Gannon Ken Van Dyke allegedly made trades on Polymarket on the basis of classified information, the justice department says.

news.title: Meta to cut one in 10 jobs after spending billions on AI
news.description: The cuts, which employees had been expecting for weeks, will be Meta's largest layoff since 2023.

news.title: How a new Amazon-backed Hollywood production startup deploys AI for speed and cost-cutting
news.description: A new AI-powered hybrid Hollywood startup backed by AWS is betting that cutting-edge production tech can cut costs, speed up filming and bring jobs back to LA.

news.title: Amazon custom chips get a boost from Meta, giving the cloud giant another path to win in AI
news.description: Amazon hits a record high after its new Meta deal highlights how AWS is gaining traction in AI through both cloud capacity and its custom chips.

news.title: Intel's stock has best day since 1987, soaring 24% as chipmaker shows signs of a turnaround
news.description: Shares of Intel have more than doubled this year on optimism that backing from the government will help the company's position in AI.

news.title: Google to invest up to $40 billion in Anthropic as search giant spreads its AI bets
news.description: Anthropic said its latest agreement with Google expands on a longstanding partnership between the two companies.

news.title: 20,000 job cuts at Meta, Microsoft raise concern that AI-driven labor crisis is here
news.description: Meta said it's cutting 10% of its workforce, just as Microsoft announced that it's offering employee buyouts for the first time in its 51-year history.

news.title: We're booking a 375% gain in a stock to raise cash for unloved names
news.description: The massive run in chip stocks is giving us an opportunity to lock in huge gains.

news.title: AMD shares soar 12% on no company news. Here's what has investors so excited
news.description: Intel's strong quarter is driving sharp gains in another chipmaker.

news.title: Musk v. Altman heads to court next week. Here's what's at stake
news.description: The high-profile trial between Elon Musk and Sam Altman is scheduled to begin Monday with jury selection.

chinaNews.title: 创1987年以来最大单日涨幅 英特尔周五暴涨24%
chinaNews.description: 英特尔股价周五飙升24%，创下自1987年10月以来的最佳单日表现，投资者对因人工智能需求增长而带来的复苏迹象感到振奋。 该股收于82.57美元，继2025年全年上涨84%之后...

chinaNews.title: 英伟达股价自10月以来首次收盘创纪录新高
chinaNews.description: 英伟达周五收于纪录新高，突破了数月以来的高点，成为这家AI芯片制造商近期动能增强的最新例证。 该股收涨4.3%，至208.26美元，超过了10月创下的收盘纪录。

chinaNews.title: 美国债市：国债上涨 美国司法部结束美联储相关调查后短端领涨
chinaNews.description: 美国国债周五上涨，收益率曲线短端领涨，此前美国司法部结束对美联储建筑翻修成本超支问题的调查，这可能为凯文·沃什出任美联储主席铺平道路。

chinaNews.title: 美联储主席鲍威尔任期将满 是否留任理事仍存变数
chinaNews.description: 美联储主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔可能正处于其央行领导生涯的最后几周。在周五司法部做出决定后，他现在面临一个选择：是否继续留在该机构任职。

chinaNews.title: 4月25日热门中概股多数上涨 台积电涨5.17%，理想汽车跌2.79%
chinaNews.description: 4月25日热门中概股多数上涨，纳斯达克中国金龙指数（HXC）收涨1.59%。 上涨个股（按市值从高到低）：台积电涨5.17%，阿里巴巴涨3.12%，拼多多涨0.30%，日月光半导体涨7...
